solutions.solution:
Sol. (c)

Statements: All lions are tigers. All tigers are leopards. Some leopards are wolves. No wolf is elephant.

Conclusions:
I. No elephant is lion.
II. Some wolves are lions.
III. Some leopards are lions.

[Venn diagrams showing Tigers, Wolves, Leopards, Lions, and Elephants relationships]

Conclusions:
I. No elephant is lion. (✓)
II. Some wolves are lions. (✗)
III. Some leopards are lions. (✓)

Sol. (c)

Statements: Some roses are flowers. Some flowers are buds. All buds are leaves. All leaves are plants.

Conclusions:
I. Some plants are flowers.
II. Some roses are buds.
III. No leaves are roses.
IV. No roses are buds.

[Venn diagrams showing relationships between Leaves, Flowers, Roses, Buds, and Plants]

Conclusions:
I. Some plants are flowers. (✓)
II. Some roses are buds. (✗)
III. No leaves are roses. (✗)
IV. No roses are buds. (✗)

Complementary pair (I-E)

[IDBI (PO) 2013]
